item.title: Madeleine McCann’s younger brother Sean to swim for Scotland at Glasgow 2026
item.summary: Freestyle swimmer eligible for Scotland through father Gerry Madeleine’s appearance in 2007 still under police investigation Madeleine McCann’s younger brother, Sean, has been selected to represent Scotland in swimming at the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow. McCann, a student at Loughborough University, is expected to compete in a number of longer-distance freestyle events when competition begins at the Tollcross International Swimming Centre on Thursday, and hopes a strong performance in Glasgow will strengthen his bid for selection to Team Great Britain for the 2028 Olympic Games in Los Angeles. McCann is eligible to represent Scotland through his father, Gerry, who was born in Glasgow. Continue reading...
